subtitle: BSc Computer Science & AI
headline:
ML Engineer
Co-Founder at Nordlys Labs
bioMarkdown:
Hi, I'm Mohamed — Co-Founder & ML Research Lead at ![Nordlys Logo](/icon/nordlys_logo.png) [Nordlys Labs](https://github.com/Nordlys-Labs/nordlys), where we built an LLM routing system that **ranked #1 on SWE-bench, defeating frontier models**, and scaled to 500+ users.

I'm a final-year Computer Science & AI student at ![RHUL Logo](/icon/rhul.png) [Royal Holloway, University of London](https://www.royalholloway.ac.uk/), graduating with First-Class Honours. My research is on transformer attention mechanisms and KV-cache compression for large language models. Alongside that, I've worked on adversarial robustness for ML-based intrusion detection at the ISG Smart Card & IoT Security Centre, sports analytics at ![Stats Perform Logo](/icon/statsperform.png) [Stats Perform](https://www.statsperform.com/), and currently teach Object-Oriented Programming & Software Engineering at Royal Holloway.

More in my [CV](./Mohamed_Atoui_CV.pdf).

**Interests:** Machine Learning, LLM Systems, Applied AI, Product Development.
blogTagline: Thoughts on AI, machine learning, and more.
